programme.title: The Last Duel
programme.desc: Jean de Carrouges is a respected knight known for his bravery and skill on the battlefield. Jacques Le Gris is a squire whose intelligence and eloquence makes him one of the most admired nobles in court. When Le Gris viciously assaults Carrouges' wife, she steps forward to accuse her attacker, an act of bravery and defiance that puts her life in jeopardy. The ensuing trial by combat, a grueling duel to the death, places the fate of all three in God's hands.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
programme.desc: Thirty years after the defeat of the Galactic Empire, the galaxy faces a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren (Adam Driver) and the First Order. When a defector named Finn crash-lands on a desert planet, he meets Rey (Daisy Ridley), a tough scavenger whose droid contains a top-secret map. Together, the young duo joins forces with Han Solo (Harrison Ford) to make sure the Resistance receives the intelligence concerning the whereabouts of Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), the last of the Jedi knights.

programme.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi
programme.desc: Luke Skywalker's peaceful and solitary existence gets upended when he encounters Rey, a young woman who shows strong signs of the Force. Her desire to learn the ways of the Jedi forces Luke to make a decision that changes their lives forever. Meanwhile, Kylo Ren and General Hux lead the First Order in an all-out assault against Leia and the Resistance for supremacy of the galaxy.

programme.title: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: Tired of their humdrum lives, some middle-aged friends decide to temporarily ditch their responsibilities and take a motorcycle trip. The freedom of the open road holds many surprises for the group, including an encounter with the Del Fuegos, a hardcore gang, who take a dim view of the novice bikers.

programme.title: My Cousin Vinny
programme.desc: New York lawyer Vinny has never won a case. When his teenage cousin Bill and his friend Stan are accused of murder in a backwater Alabama town, it's up to the nervous Vinny to save him from jail, even though he's only ever tried personal injury cases before, and none of them successfully.

programme.title: Downhill
programme.desc: A woman starts to have second doubts about her husband after he runs away from an approaching avalanche, leaving her and their two sons behind.

programme.title: Can-Can
programme.desc: Parisian nightclub owner Simone Pistache (Shirley MacLaine) is known for her performances of the can-can, a provocative dance recently outlawed for being immoral. Though her dancing delights patrons to no end, it also attracts the ire of the self-righteous Judge Philippe Forrestier (Louis Jourdan), who aims to punish her. The judge hatches a plot to photograph Simone in the act and ends up falling for her -- much to the chagrin of her boyfriend, handsome lawyer François Durnais (Frank Sinatra).

programme.title: An Affair to Remember
programme.desc: A man and a woman have a romance while on a cruise from Europe to New York. Despite being engaged to other people, both agree to reunite at the top of the Empire State Building in six months. However, an unfortunate accident keeps her from the reunion, and he fears that she has married or does not love him anymore.

programme.title: How to Be Very, Very Popular
programme.desc: A showgirl from the San Francisco cabaret is murdered, and the only witnesses are fellow showgirls Stormy Tornado (Betty Grable) and Curly Flagg (Sheree North). Afraid of both the murderers and the cops, the two go on the run, eventually deciding to pose as male students at Bristol College. Neither girl can avoid the spotlight for too long, though, and their constant desire to stand out among the crowd eventually gets the better of them, resulting in their cover being blown.

programme.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
programme.desc: Schatze Page, Loco Dempsey and Pola Debevoise (Lauren Bacall, Betty Grable, Marilyn Monroe) are three women on a mission: They all want to marry a millionaire. To accomplish this task, they move into a fancy New York City apartment and begin courting the city's elite. They have no problem meeting rich men, but unfortunately most of them turn out to be creeps or cons. Eventually they must decide: Is a life of luxury more important to them than finding true love?

programme.title: The Seven Year Itch
programme.desc: In the midst of a summer heat wave, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) ships his wife, Helen (Evelyn Keyes), and their son off to Maine for vacation. Left alone to work back in Manhattan, Richard encounters a gorgeous blonde model (Marilyn Monroe) who has moved into the apartment upstairs, and becomes immediately infatuated. While pondering infidelity, Richard dreams of his beautiful new neighbor -- but will his fantasies about her become a reality?

programme.title: Let's Make Love
programme.desc: One of the wealthiest men in the world, Jean-Marc Clement (Yves Montand) is rich in money, but lacking in love. While seeking someone who adores him for his personality rather than his fortune, Clement learns that he is the subject of a satirical theater production. Unrecognized as he visits the play's set, Clement is offered the part as himself by the show's unwitting producers, and he takes the gig to be close to the gorgeous yet down-to-earth actress Amanda Dell (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Downhill
programme.desc: A woman starts to have second doubts about her husband after he runs away from an approaching avalanche, leaving her and their two sons behind.

programme.title: This Means War
programme.desc: CIA operatives FDR Foster (Chris Pine) and Tuck (Tom Hardy) are inseparable best friends and partners. Together, their good looks, covert abilities and combat skills rank them among the CIA's elite, but their longstanding personal and professional bond is put to the test when they meet Lauren (Reese Witherspoon). FDR and Tuck both fall hard for the beautiful blonde, turning their deadly skills and an array of high-tech gadgetry against each other in an all-out battle for her love.

programme.title: True Lies
programme.desc: Secretly a spy but thought by his family to be a dull salesman, Harry Tasker (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tracking down nuclear missiles in the possession of Islamic jihadist Aziz (Art Malik). Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service
programme.desc: Gary "Eggsy" Unwin (Taron Egerton), whose late father secretly worked for a spy organization, lives in a South London housing estate and seems headed for a life behind bars. However, dapper agent Harry Hart (Colin Firth) recognizes potential in the youth and recruits him to be a trainee in the secret service. Meanwhile, villainous Richmond Valentine (Samuel L. Jackson) launches a diabolical plan to solve the problem of climate change via a worldwide killing spree.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Richard Hooker, M*A*S*H follows a group of Mobile Army Surgical Hospital officers at they perform surgery and pass the time just miles from the front lines of the Korean Conflict. Led by Captains Hawkeye Pierce (Donald Sutherland) and Trapper John McIntyre (Elliott Gould), they add to the chaos and hilarity of the situation.

programme.title: The Detective
programme.desc: When a gay man is viciously slain, Detective Joe Leland (Frank Sinatra) is put on the case. Joe eventually tracks down the victim's roommate, who confesses to the crime and is sentenced to death; however, the outcome of the case doesn't sit well with the detective. Norma (Jacqueline Bisset), a distraught widow, visits Joe. She believes her husband's death was no accident, but the cops don't seem to care. Joe begins to investigate, and stumbles on a cover-up related to his previous case.

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt, a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meets Oktober, the mysterious leader of the group.

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov, the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police. Their plans are interrupted, however, when their Moscow hideout is raided by a cunning politician.

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist organization is holding an English ambassador hostage, which further complicates matters.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Two years ago, retired CIA agent Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) used his "particular set of skills" to rescue his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace), from kidnappers. Since then, Kim has been learning self-defense from her father, and Bryan has been on a personal mission to reunite with his ex-wife (Famke Janssen). In Istanbul, Bryan and his family cross paths with Murad (Rade Serbedzija), whose son died at Bryan's hand during Kim's rescue. Murad wants revenge, and he'll stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Ex-covert operative Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) and his ex-wife, Lenore (Famke Janssen), are enjoying a reconciliation when Lenore is brutally murdered. Bryan is framed for the crime and flees, with the CIA, FBI and police all in hot pursuit. For the last time, he channels his rage and particular set of skills into hunting down Lenore's real killers, taking his revenge and protecting the one important thing left in his life: his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace).

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: A depressed man suffering from insomnia meets a strange soap salesman named Tyler Durden and soon finds himself living in his squalid house after his perfect apartment is destroyed. The two bored men form an underground club with strict rules and fight other men who are fed up with their mundane lives. Their perfect partnership frays when Marla, a fellow support group crasher, attracts Tyler's attention.

programme.title: The Hustler
programme.desc: The story follows Fast Eddie Felsen (Paul Newman) and his adventures in the world of professional pool. Fast Eddie is a young hopeful on his way to challenging Minnesota Fats (Jackie Gleason) for his world title. When he starts getting feelings for a woman he gets into a dilemma.

programme.title: Surf Party
programme.desc: An Arizona gal (Patricia Morrow) and her friends enjoy sun, sand and romance when they drive out to California for a surfing vacation.

programme.title: Wild on the Beach
programme.desc: Music and romance abound as two groups of college students fight for their right to party at a beach house.

programme.title: The Day Mars Invaded Earth
programme.desc: A Cape Canaveral scientist finds Martians reducing people to ashes and taking their places.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Kaaapowie! Holy feature film, Batman ... one based on the tongue-in-cheek, campy 1960s television series. Watch Batman and Robin battle sharks, Catwoman, The Joker and The Riddler on the big screen. Can they try to prevent the bad guys from taking over the world? With a wham! and a pow! and a zip! ... our heroes just might win.

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage
programme.desc: The brilliant scientist Jan Benes develops a way to shrink humans, and other objects, for brief periods of time. Benes, who is working in communist Russia, is transported by the CIA to America, but is attacked en route. In order to save the scientist, who has developed a blood clot in his brain, a team of Americans in a nuclear submarine is shrunk and injected into Benes' body. They have a finite period of time to fix the clot and get out before the miniaturization wears off.

programme.title: Fathom
programme.desc: While touring abroad in Europe, beautiful American skydiver Fathom Harvill (Raquel Welch) gets wrapped up in international intrigue when Scottish spy Douglas Campbell (Ronald Fraser) recruits her to help him on a secret mission. Before long, Fathom realizes that no one around her, including the mysterious Peter Merriweather (Tony Franciosa), can easily be trusted, leading to various adventures that involve bull fighting, beaches and, of course, romance.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and budding actress whose futures will forever be altered by members of the Manson Family.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: Dick Harper's (Jim Carrey) years of hard work finally pay off when he is promoted to vice president at Glabodyne, a world leader in the consolidation of media properties. But after exactly one day on his new job, Glabodyne is destroyed by an Enron-like calamity and he is left holding the bag. Dick's sudden reversal of fortune has left him little time to set aside money for a rainy day. After playing by the rules and working single-mindedly to build a comfortable life for his family, Dick is utterly unprepared to give up on the American dream. Taking a lesson from his corrupt employer, Dick hits on a brilliant idea: If stealing is good enough for his boss, then it's good enough for him. Using his new found skills, he and Jane exact hilarious revenge and teach big business a lesson.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure DADDY DAY CAMP secures its rightful place in kid camp history!

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: After eating from the Tree of Knowledge, a primitive villager/slacker flees his people and encounters murderous Cain, slave traders, charismatic nutcase Abraham, and finally the city of Sodom. There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure DADDY DAY CAMP secures its rightful place in kid camp history!

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: After eating from the Tree of Knowledge, a primitive villager/slacker flees his people and encounters murderous Cain, slave traders, charismatic nutcase Abraham, and finally the city of Sodom. There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: Meet Hitch (Will Smith), New York City's greatest matchmaker. Love is his job and he'll get you the girl of your dreams in just three easy dates, guaranteed!

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding (1997)
programme.desc: Two friends (Julia Roberts and Dermot Mulroney) go from an impossible possibility to an unimaginable reality in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: After moving to a small town, Zach Cooper finds a silver lining when he meets next door neighbor Hannah, the daughter of bestselling Goosebumps series author R.L. Stine. Stine is very mysterious and a prisoner of his own imagination – the monsters that his books made famous are real, and he protects his readers by keeping them locked up in their manuscripts. When the monsters are accidentally unleashed and begin to terrorize the town, it's up to Stine, Zach and Hannah to get them back in their books where they belong.

programme.title: Here Today (2021)
programme.desc: Legendary comedy writer, Charlie Berns, in the initial stages of dementia, is befriended by Emma, a plucky, spirited, gutsy young singer and street performer who is not about to bail on Charlie, even as his condition deteriorates.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A widow's husband is reincarnated 25 years later as a dashing young man their daughter's age.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Meryl Streep is Julia Child and Amy Adams is Julie Powell in writer-director Nora Ephron's adaptation of two bestselling memoirs: Powell's Julie & Julia and My Life in France, by Julia Child with Alex Prud'homme. Based on two true stories, Julie & Julia intertwines the lives of two women who, though separated by time and space, are both at loose ends...until they discover that with the right combination of passion, fearlessness and butter, anything is possible.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: The Toy (1982)
programme.desc: Remake of the Pierre Richard comedy LE JOUET with Pryor as a penniless writer hired by zillionaire Gleason as plaything for spoiled son Schwartz. Gleason tells his son he can have any present he wants and the son picks the most outrageous gift of all--Richard Pryor.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Irving Bates is absolutely certain that you are only young once.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Because of Serena's spell, a college girl is forced to change her image and Darrin is almost forced to change his job.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin learns what to do about those days you can't get out.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity results in a wolf being changed to a bird.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The shoe fits so Darrin wears them -- and needs Samantha's help to get them off.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin becomes a Da Vinci with a kiss and a twitch from Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha uses insults to please a poet while Darrin uses an amulet to curb Endora's insults.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Love at first sight presents more problems than romance for Darrin and Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: To Go Or Not To Go, That Is The Question
programme.desc: The High Priestess of Witchdom dethrones Darrin in his own "castle."

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Empress Hepzibah's decision that witches and mortals don't mix is delayed.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin discovers that bedwarmers can be worse than mothers-in-law, es-pecially when they're "hot."

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin can't be held for theft when the evidence turns out to be an old flame of Serena's.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A flirtation of Serena's turns Darrin to stone.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda's wacky witchcraft causes Paul Revere to ride again.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha runs into an old flame whose affection for her gives Darrin something to "crow" about.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin find out that 17th Century Salem is no place for a witch without witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Ashley Flynn, a warlock, tries to sweep Samantha off her feet but winds up helping Darrin get a new client.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin falls into the generation gap when he instantly becomes an old man after an unfriendly "zap" from Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha stirs up an impotent potion to get Darrin to stir up creative juices of his own.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Lisa uses wishcraft and learns a lesson in sisterhood.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora has her day and her way as-Darrin tries to sell bon bons.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Good Fairy gets into the brandy and makes-Samantha her substitute.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Good Fairy turns out to be bad news for Darrin and Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Return Of Darrin The Bold
programme.desc: Darrin is warlock for a day, courtesy of his interfering mother-in-law.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The House That Uncle Arthur Built
programme.desc: Uncle Arthur's romance turns out to be less practical than his jokes.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When Samantha's away, Serena tries to play and Darrin almost loses his hair over an advertising account.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin can't be held for theft when the evidence turns out to be an old flame of Serena's.

programme.desc: A flirtation of Serena's turns Darrin to stone.

programme.title: Bewitched

programme.title: Bewitched

Everyone's abuzz when the "birds and the bees" invade "227," but Brenda and Calvin may wind up getting stung when Mary discovers their secret rendezvous.

Mary's friends head for the highway after she implicates them in an angry letter to the President about a street pothole--but they make a quick U-turn when they discover the President himself is coming to fill in the hole. Film and television star Leslie Nielsen stars as investigating Secret Service agent, Bob Gamble.

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.
Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.
When Mary buys a piano, Rose peddles her teaching services to both her and Sandra--and the two pupils' rivalry inspires a competitive recital to determine who's learned more in three weeks.

When their church loses its lease, Mary coaxes an already overburdened Lester into supervising its move to a new location--but the parishioners are left without a place to worship on Christmas Day when the building mysteriously disappears
Mary and Sandra offer differing opinions when Rose is asked to spend the weekend in New York with the man of her dreams--who also happens to be one of Sandra's ex-nightmares.
When Calvin stays at the Jenkins' for the weekend, he misreads Sandra's attempts to cheer him up and falls madly in love with her, putting Mary in an awkward position.

When Lester's supposedly wealthy friend mysteriously accepts work as the building handyman, Mary sets out reveal his real motive and accidentally unveils more than one skeleton harbored in his "closet." Wrestling impresario Captain Lou Albano makes his television series debut as the gregarious handyman, Gus Santo.
Lester's dreams of cashing in his bonus from work for a new sports car come to a screeching halt when burglars break in and clean out the apartment--fueling Mary's desire to get new furniture.
Mary and Brenda cry foul when Sandra hooks up with a pro basketball player whose arrogant moves and behind-the-back "passes" rub off on impressionable Calvin.

Mary and Lester throw an extravagant bash for her parents' 50th wedding anniversary, only to find that the guests of honor aren't speaking to each other. Veteran performers Beah Richards and Whitman Mayo guest star as Mary's feuding parents.

Mary gambles her relationship with Rose and Pearl when she belittles their passion for the lottery, but the odds of losing their friendship increase when Sandra spies Mary playing a hunch and buying her own ticket.

Mary, Rose and Pearl may be sent "up the river" after they go overboard defending "227" against a graffiti artist who then sues them for assault--and it seems even bleaker when the key to their defense is the testimony of a lone eyewitness--Sandra.
Mary and Rose help Pearl face the loneliness of old age by escorting her to a single's bar where she meets the man of her dreams--and promptly gets engaged.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is so miserable when her favorite bra is discontinued, that Al is forced to take matters into his own hands and find a replacement.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Steve face up to the bald fact that they are both losing their hair, they decide to seek the counsel and encouragement of a hairless support group.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy hopes that an overnight stay in a motel will liven up her sex life with Al only to discover that their most intimate moments have been videotaped by the management.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When a gypsy fortune teller predicts disaster for Marcy and good fortune for Al, Steve and Peggy, Marcy insists that they accompany her on a plane trip to New York, first class, of course.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al's long-time barber passes on, Al is forced to face the fact that the old-fashioned barber shop is a thing of the past and resigns himself to a future of beauty salon haircuts.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundy's receive a modest inheritance check from Peg's deceased uncle, they decide to splurge and eat out at an elegant restaurant.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is the hit of Mother/Daughter Career Day at Kelly's school when she instructs the girls in the art of being a housewife, including demonstrations of wallet pilfering and mastering the TV remote control.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Kelly is faced with a choice of getting kicked out of school or joining the tap dance club, she swallows her pride, buckles on her tap shoes and performs some dirty dancing that leaves the audience sweating in their seats.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: A Three Job, No Income Family
programme.desc: When Peggy gets a job selling cosmetics and brings home more money than Al, he gets a second job to regain his self-respect, but still finds himself losing the breadwinning game.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: After Peggy gives the highway salute to a rude driver while in the Rhoades' car, Steve is obsessed with the fear that the enraged driver -- a possible ex-con -- may come looking for him.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy return from vacation after entrusting the keys to their house to Peggy, they're shocked to find a big hole where their house used to be.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In this two-part story, Peggy and Al attend the Polk High School Reunion where Peggy is determined to defeat her old nemesis for the title of Reunion Queen.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy vigorously campaigns for the title of Reunion Queen while Al settles an old score with a former classmate at the Polk High School Reunion.

programme.desc: Peggy brings the family closer to the poorhouse when she insists on buying a home computer.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Jagged Edge (1985)
programme.desc: A defense attorney (Glenn Close) falls for her client, a rich, handsome publisher (Jeff Bridges) who may or may not be what the prosecution claims he is: a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A paralyzed forensics expert and a young policewoman must work together to stop a brutal serial killer.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger is movie idol Jack Slater in Last Action Hero, which follows the adventures of 11-year-old Danny (Austin O'Brien), whose magic ticket blasts him out of his theater seat and into an action movie. There he teams up with Slater, living his wildest fantasies in a celluloid world where anything is possible.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four friends made a pact to conceal a shocking secret. But now, someone has learned the truth.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy’s promotional stunt has unintended consequences. Nacho takes extreme measures to earn Lalo’s trust. “Saul” is a success at the courthouse, but still has yet to win Kim over. Simmering with rage and self-loathing, Mike loses his temper.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Jimmy's business enters uncharted territory. Kim's confidence is tested when she's faced with a legal problem only she can solve. Nacho navigates increased pressure from Gus. Mike continues to spiral.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: As Jimmy doubles down on “Saul Goodman,” a deeply conflicted Kim brings him an interesting proposition. Gus makes a sacrifice in order to play the long game. Mike attempts to smooth things over with his family.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Mike takes an impromptu trip. As she and Jimmy grow closer over their campaign to help a client, Kim makes a surprising call.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Kim tries to pump the brakes on Jimmy's latest scheme, but it may be too late to stop Saul; Mike turns the heat up on Lalo; Nacho attempts to enlist support from above.

programme.title: Better Call Saul

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. The countdown for the legendary party Scousechella is on and the whole school scrambles to get tickets, Christopher struggles with the anniversary of his mother's passing away as a misunderstanding about the next steps in his relationship with Aimee threatens their bond, and Reece wrestles with feelings of irrelevance given that both Connor and his mum seem to be moving on without him. Scousechella itself lives up to its hype and wild reputation, but things take a turn back at the school when a mysterious hacker named Ye Ma leaks footage from the party and reveals uncomfortable truths about relationships and consent - involving Reece, Aimee, Connor and Lauren - that leaves friendships and reputations hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Meanwhile, Jason and Aurelius both join a male escort agency known as the Knights of Eros.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: Family adventure adaptation of American author EB White's classic 1952 children's book of the same name. A young girl called Fern rescues a runty piglet, raises it as her own, and names him Wilbur - however, Wilbur grows into a pig and she is forced to sell him to her uncle Homer Zuckerman down the road from her house. Wilbur meets a host of animals at Zuckerman's barn - and learns from them that he will be killed for food when winter comes before a gentle and wise spider comes to his aid...

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. When a 'wardrobe malfunction' occurs during a live broadcast, the Federal Communications Commission begins to censor Peter's favourite television shows. As a result, Peter creates his own TV station which broadcasts from the Griffin home. Peter and Brian create their own edgy programming for the station, until the FCC shows up to shut down PTV and censor all controversial material in Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about American family life. When Lois is short on cash and cannot pay her grocery store bill, she resorts to stealing. The adrenaline rush from shoplifting sends her on a stealing spree that spirals out of control and puts her behind bars. Back at home, the family is a mess without Lois, so Peter and the kids decide to break her out of the clinker to get things back to normal.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Meanwhile, Roger becomes a bartender in the hope of making something of himself.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about Stan Smith, the super-patriotic US secret agent. Hayley decides to move to France, so Stan uses CIA hypnosis to keep her in the country.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. Mia-Louise heads to a gaming expo where she unexpectedly comes face to face with her online partner James and the gap in age between them is finally revealed, and Connor finds himself at the centre of a school scandal when he is accused of sexually assaulting Lauren at Scousechella - meanwhile, Lauren struggles to reclaim her voice about what happened while everyone else showcases theirs, and especially in the case of The Brimble who escalates the drama and tensions with a podcast on consent. After Lauren finally confronts Connor and reveals truths about their relationship that clarify events at the party, the pair find closure and a friendship moving forward - elsewhere, Christopher struggles with jealousy over Aimee and Reece's kiss at the party and is offered support by Jodie, and Mia-Louise's relationship with James takes a turn when she makes an impulsive visit to his flat.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. It's the 100-year anniversary of Allsbrooke School - when Mr Meacher wants to celebrate it with an event highlighting its impact on past pupils' legacies and its ongoing influence on current students, this prompts Reece to confront some feelings he has been wrestling with as Mr Dunn's and Jodie's complicated history also comes to light. Meanwhile, Mia-Louise must make a decision on her relationship with James, there's a surprise twist as the person behind Ye Ma is finally revealed at the 100-year anniversary event when they release another video which helps Aimee realise a truth about her relationship with Christopher, and Mr Meacher inspires Reece to step up and deliver a surprise heartfelt speech that urges his fellow pupils to embrace the transformative and unique moments of their school years.

programme.title: Plebs

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Members of the Midsomer-in-the-Marsh Ornithological Society fall out when one of them, Ralph Ford, claims that he has spotted a blue-crested hoopoe - the sighting puts him ahead in a list competition, but MMOS president Patrick Morgan says that the bird could never have been seen in Midsomer as it is native to Uganda. Ralph storms out of the meeting infuriated - the next day Patrick is found dead in Swansdown Lake, the scene of the alleged hoopoe sighting, and his body is pulled from the lake entangled in a mist net used to catch and release birds. The dead man's wife Nina, a former Russian prima ballerina, had recently become pregnant - before his death Patrick Morgan accused Nina of sleeping with another man and professed it to be impossible that she was pregnant. Was Patrick's obsession with ornithology really to blame for his death, or something more sinister? Barnaby and Jones attempt to discover the truth.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin find themselves with no leads while investigating the case of 13-year-old Danny Jackson, who is found, kicked to death at Euston Station. When they manage to locate the teenager's family, they discover a tangled web of family loyalties that covers Danny's ex-junkie mother, her allegedly abusive boyfriend, and Danny's foster mother. As the police officers uncover more about Danny's life, they become emotionally involved. But who was responsible for the boy's death? Meanwhile, Crown Prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips are up against defence barrister Beatrice McArdle, an old flame of James's. McArdle seems to be running a suspiciously simplistic strategy, until James and Alesha discover that she is gathering evidence for a defence so audacious that it could change the whole nature of the British legal system.

Meanwhile, an incandescent Evie Pritchard smells alcohol on DCI Gill Murray's breath and seems to have all the ammunition that she needs to discredit both the investigation and Gill. programme.desc: Support Show 3 - Tourist Trophy: An access-all-areas look into the world of the top TT riders, looking at their preparation for TT fortnight and their lives outside of racing. [S]

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Live

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Nail-biting documentary series. Jack Jessee traverses steep mountain passes during an urgent fuel delivery and fears that he may get stranded on a frozen river as a storm closes in, Lisa Kelly faces a big challenge as she handles an oversized load that leaves little margin for error, and the rivalry between Alex Debogorski and Hugh Rowland continues.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Edwin Jagger Safety Razors and Savile Row Suits: Meet the Sheffield man making classic safety razors, then learn about the labour of love that goes into making a Savile Row suit. [S,AD] S1 Ep16

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan. [S]

programme.title: Road to 26: Morocco v Norway
programme.desc: The Road to 26 series continues with a game between Morocco, who reached the World Cup semi-finals in Qatar 2022, and Norway, who have not qualified for a World Cup since 1998. [S]

programme.title: Goals of the 1990s
programme.desc: A look at some of the greatest goals from the 1990s, including memorable World Cup strikes by Platt, Maradona and Owen, and Euros classics from Gascoigne, Suker and Poborsky. [S]

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The teams on a loaded fight card take on their third fight of the qualifiers - some are in dire need of a season-saving victory while others look to storm ahead to a top seeding in the BattleBots VII World Championship tournament. With the selection committee watching their every move, it's up to the bots to deliver show-stopping performances and prove that they belong amongst the best bots in the world - it's nonstop action and carnage, and i all builds to a kill-or-be-killed Main Event between superstars End Game and HyperShock.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. The detective is hired to look after a beautiful ballerina and finds many people who are highly interested in her, but an equally large number of people are anxious to distract him from his duties, and events culminate in terror for the ballerina.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is hired to recover notes and source material stolen from a ghost writer hired to whip the autobiography of an eccentric inventor into shape.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken and Margaret try to track down a missing husband who has absconded with the firm's money, and Harry employs cowboy electricians who leave the ballroom without electricity.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama. When Regan loses his patience with a thug he is questioning about a wages snatch, the press are soon sniffing round for a police brutality story and the suspect's gangster brother puts out a contract on Regan.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur decides that it might be a good idea to hire his second-hand cars out if he's not able to sell them, but Ray has some trouble with the customers.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank meet a man who claims to possess psychic powers and visit an old farm that turns out to be a treasure trove.

programme.title: World Cup Countdown
programme.desc: The countdown to the FIFA World Cup 2026 is on and Daniyal Khan, Cams Babayemi, Kweku Afari, Roy Keane, Ian Wright and the gang are giving a full rundown of what to expect ahead of the biggest tournament ever this summer. In this episode, we discuss England's chances and Ian Wright offers us his starting England 11. David McCready starts to recreate the best World Cup goals of all time and we visit New York City.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. The Protectors are hired to track down Bennett, a missing Canadian agent who holds valuable information about a new American-Canadian sky project.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The pressure is on with the Round of 32 getting nearer and time running out for teams to make lasting impressions and prove that they have tournament-qualifying talent - the card this time features an eclectic mix of hard-hitting favourites like Copperhead and Deathroll, struggling mid-tier sleepers like Mammoth and Kraken, and an electric Main Event between two bots who are both desperate for a big win in the form of Series 5 runner-up Whiplash and the Brits with Bite and their bot Monsoon.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. The arrival of a news correspondent and an assassin in Honolulu sparks off a dangerous situation involving international politics and terrorism.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is hired to track down a computer hacker and keep a close watch on a woman who may be having an affair.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. An unscrupulous fast food supremo gets what he deserves for his maltreatment of young employees, and Harry organises an American pageant and square dance at the Plaza Suite.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Action-packed police drama series. Carter's wife Alison is mistaken for a fellow teacher with dubious connections and is killed by a hired assassin.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's eyes light up with pound-note signs when he learns he may be in line to inherit a fortune, but he and Ray must first trace the Daley ancestry.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Preview Show
programme.desc: Scotland, Sweden, Czechia and Turkiye. Qualification defined by pressure. This episode captures the fine margins between success and failure - four nations whose place was secured in decisive moments, where composure and belief were tested to the limit.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Preview Show
programme.desc: Argentina, Portugal, Spain and France. Legacy defines greatness. This episode closes the series at its highest level - four nations not just competing for a World Cup but defining the era through the players and identities that shape modern football.

programme.title: World Cup Countdown
programme.desc: The countdown to the FIFA World Cup 2026 is on and Daniyal Khan, Cams Babayemi, Kweku Afari, Roy Keane, Ian Wright and the gang are giving a full rundown of what to expect ahead of the biggest tournament ever this summer. We continue to discuss all the key talking points group by group, visit each host city and David McCready continues to recreate the best World Cup goals ever.
